items.title: [正面] My gambling addict friend said if I post a review ...
items.summary:
My gambling addict friend said if I post a review and it gets 150 likes and 50 Awards that he will buy me a case of beer, some vodka and 1 kg of lemon So im just gonna leave this here.

Мой друг-игроман сказал, что если я опубликую отзыв и он наберет 150 лайков и 50 наград, он купит мне ящик пива, немного водки и 1 кг лимона, так что я просто оставлю это здесь.

items.title: [正面] Close to no FOMO and limited characters are regula...
items.summary:
Close to no FOMO and limited characters are regularly coming back, so it's easy to get what you want.

On top of that, the story is really good and got me hooked. 

Loving my time with it <3

items.title: [正面] Probably the best gacha I've ever played. The game...
items.summary:
Probably the best gacha I've ever played. The gameplay is so much fun and all the characters have well thought out personalities and connections to the story which is also amazing. I truly hope more people find this game and give it a try because it is more than worth it.

If you like, Gachas that arent a farm fest, gameplay that is more than fair and entertaining that has depth and a sense of challlenge we hardly find anymore, and finaly a well thought out story based on H.P Lovecraft, this is the game for you.

items.title: [正面] La verdad, no esperaba mucho cuando encontre el ju...
items.summary:
La verdad, no esperaba mucho cuando encontre el juego en enero de 2025 a las 3 de la mañana, se lo mande a un amigo y lo comenzamos en llamada...
me atrapo desde el primer momento, es increible como maneja los temas que quiere tratar sobre el olvido, la memoria y el sacrificio... al tomar inspiracion de temas lovecraftiano fue el punto clave para darme ganas de comenzar obras de ese autor y comprarme unos libros.

mi gacha favorito y un gameplay muy divertido.
